metadata.description: docs-creator + component-creator plugins for Claude Code — documentation authoring and Figma-to-code component creation.

plugins.name: docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs. Ships analyze-frontend, create-frontend-docs, analyze-api-contracts, init-project, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, menu and more.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Figma-to-code component creation with SSIM visual verification, Code Connect integration, and component registry.
